title: Vocabulary Context Review
wrongAnswerPattern: The student chooses a familiar word without checking the sentence context.
reviewMethod: Underline the context clue, predict the meaning first, then compare options.

title: Quant Formula Review
wrongAnswerPattern: The student remembers a formula but uses the wrong base value or skips units.
reviewMethod: Write original value, change, final value and formula before selecting the option.

title: Reading Main Idea Review
wrongAnswerPattern: The student selects a minor detail instead of the central message.
reviewMethod: Ask what the whole passage is mainly proving, not what one sentence mentions.

title: Reasoning Assumption Review
wrongAnswerPattern: The student chooses an attractive option that is true but not required by the argument.
reviewMethod: Separate evidence and conclusion, then ask what hidden bridge must be true.
